item.title: A months worth of my medication. Thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act what has cost me $214 will now cost $15.50 a month. Thanks Joe Biden. VP Kamala Harris cast the tie-breaking vote. Every house/senate republicans voted against this bill.
item.description: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Inflation_Reduction_Act
item.dc:creator: naturepriestess

item.title: Images of Note: No ultramarines
item.description:
J U D A S !
they can pick up every 10 station known to man and 10 known to monkeys
That's what they'd do for a Klondike bar
Two Crossbows!
sneaky
they have an iconic duo with a redhead
OUTRAGEOUS
Nuclear bombs go off It's the apocalypse
Well user, you made it to the bottom of the image, despite it's height.
(plays louder music)
the threatening uncrustable.
oh no
it's magic, you don't have to explain shit.
V I O L E N C E
yeah
I will never forget that priest
creech
POWER WORD: URETHRAL PROLAPSE!
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Not as lonely as some, but I miss the Missus
item.description: Geographic bachelor for another week. Sucks that all the people that love me like this are in another timezone but I'll see most of them soon!

item.title: If it looks like slavery, smells like slavery, and makes them money like slavery...
item.description: Stealing women's bodily autonomy is a form of slavery. Prove me wrong. https://www.rawstory.com/missouri-ag-tells-judge-drop-in-teen-pregnancies-hurts-state-financially/ https://missouriindependent.com/2023/06/20/judge-missouri-ag-had-absolute-absence-of-authority-to-question-abortion-initiative-cost/ Link for info on abortion pills: https://www.plancpills.org/ Video at bottom of post.

item.description: Good ol’ rock, nothing beats that!
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: AOC be like: “seriously? that’s how you’re disrespecting me and my constituents?”
item.description:
The video continues bellow. I wouldn’t dare, squeeze AOC in a minute. This person is one of the bravest house representatives that know what is to be exploited, underpaid, have her wages stolen by her employer, and being so mad at it that she ran for office. DO NOT MESS WITH AOC.
She did not say it but IQ45 and Muskrat’s stunts are the most recent “let them eat cake”, but there’s not even crumbs to pass around. Tax the billionaires the same way the workers and the middle-class are taxed. PERIOD.
Muskrat must have had confused the USA with Apartheid South Africa in his ongoing ketamine trips. Honestly, I am rethinking some of my arguments on @threads and @bluesky about him being sent back to the English, Irish, Dutch rock his grandparents came from. He is a menace to Humanity! He must be locked up for life for the amount of crimes he has been committing non stop and endangering people’s lives.
item.dc:creator: KamalaHarris2024

item.title: I love his answer so much
item.description: I understand what Jon Stewart was asking. But I love Tim Walz answer so much better **FP Edit** thanks guys for sharing this and getting it to the front page. My wish? For everybody to drink lots of water, vote, and be kind to all animals. I know that's three, but those are a good three wishes to have for anyone.
item.dc:creator: PlantBasedCJ

item.title: It’s my cake day! Let’s do this!
item.description:
I tell people about this. I have never had the opportunity to try it, yet.
Clap, clap, clap your hands now
I picture a wood fence with the name Noah all over it
Is that street legal? Would Vin Diesel drive it?
In yo face!
I see you
Bruh
Moon moon is cute but they missed the chance to name it something that could rhyme with orange.
Puppy tax! Meet Pablo.
item.dc:creator: lsp2009

item.title: Memes vol 387
item.description:
When my dad met my boyfriend he asked if he spoke Mexican and I wanted to die
I wanna tag him but then there’ll be unnecessary drama (¬､¬)
I’m actually dating thicc man- so he’s been discovered by me
THIS IS FUCKING NUTS
I love Robin he’s just darling
I immediately think of like… the omega verse- unfortunately so I think those dudes want to get dicked down by a huge werewolf
The last panel is SO CUTE
Liza Jane tax
Nessie tax
Scruffy tax
Froggy tax

item.title: Amazing work
item.description: The cloisonné technique is a hot enamel method. It involves applying enamel and then firing it. The piece is then sanded several times to achieve a perfectly smooth surface flush with the metal.
item.dc:creator: Joxtar

item.title: Cake or Not
item.description: It is cake!
item.dc:creator: Imadethisaccounttopost

item.title: If a Democratic candidate did this, Fox News would be SCREECHING about it for WEEKS.
item.description:
Every dumb right wing account on Xitter would be accusing them of pedophilia. (WHY ARE THEY TOUCHING THOSE KIDS?! GROOMERS!!!) But somehow it's okay and not at all weird for GOP candidates to do this?
Apparently it's some sort of GOP ad strategy? Like they heard JD Vance talking about how worthless people without kids are, and thought, "Oh shit! Oh fuck! What am I gonna do?!", and settled on "Fake it til you make it", or something. As one does.
Very normal. Very not-weird. https://www.texastribune.org/2024/10/22/texas-house-caroline-harris-davila-children-ad/ (P.S. I voted early today in Texas! :D Fuck a Blue wave - I wanna see a TSUNAMI. Y'all PLEASE do your part!)
item.dc:creator: ButtersTheCat

item.title: The United States of Oof
item.dc:creator: Glibson

item.title: This is good news!!
item.description: I’m gonna be honest, I am legitimately concerned about my foster kitten Jason. He came to me at a healthy 1.4 pounds and he is down to 1 pound. I’m doing subcutaneous fluids, appetite stimulant gel, de-worming medication, high-calorie supplements, and the tastiest wet food known to cat-kind. But he is still very lethargic and not eating much. But I popped into the kitten room before bed to give him one last dose of fluids and set out the Cadillac of wet food - Royal Canin Mother and Babycat mousse - and he dove right in! This is a good sign. Please keep this up, baby boy!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: The Secret Ingredient is Crime
item.description: Evidently, it was an actual pizza, served with a side of cocaine. https://www.latintimes.com/pizza-parlor-busted-after-best-selling-pizza-turns-out-cocaine-563127
item.dc:creator: ButtersTheCat

item.title: A little visit to Mt. Rainier National Park
item.description:
Don't ask me what type of berries
This park in is Washington state, USA. Approx 46 n and 121 w
At Myrtle Falls
Classic view of Christine Falls
Take the trail to above Christine Falls.
item.dc:creator: 2112eric5772
